hero.title: Front-End Developer focused on performance, experience, and quality.
hero.description: I'm Cássio C. Camargo, a specialist in React.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. I develop modern, responsive, and accessible interfaces, applying best practices and industry standards to create efficient, scalable, and results-oriented digital solutions.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: How I can help
services.description: I transform your idea into a well-built application with organized code, high performance, and an interface that truly works in everyday use.

items.title: Landing Pages and Websites
items.description: Responsive interfaces built from layouts with a consistent structure.

items.title: API Integration
items.description: Integration with REST APIs and data handling for dynamic applications.

items.title: System Interfaces
items.description: Dashboards and system screens with componentization and organization.

items.title: Performance and SEO
items.description: Loading optimization and adjustments for better performance and indexing.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: Understanding the project, goals, and aligning on scope and deadlines.

steps.title: Planning
steps.description: Defining architecture, technologies, and code organization.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Development with a focus on performance and design fidelity.

steps.title: Delivery & QA
steps.description: Testing, final review, deployment, documentation, and post-delivery support.

items.title: Zanetti Portfolio
items.description: This project was developed to strengthen the digital presence of a local artist through a modern, intuitive, and responsive interface. Built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, the portfolio features fluid navigation and a carefully crafted visual experience, highlighting artistic content while facilitating information access. The application follows front-end development best practices, focusing on performance, code organization, and usability, ensuring a consistent delivery aligned with professional standards.

items.title: Barbershop Project
items.description: A landing page developed for a barbershop, focusing on conversion and strengthening digital presence. The application features a modern, responsive design optimized for various devices, providing fluid and intuitive navigation. Built with React, TypeScript, and Sass, the solution follows best practices in componentization, code organization, and performance, ensuring scalability and ease of maintenance. The project was designed to highlight services, attract new customers, and boost results.

items.title: Finance
items.description: A web application for the financial sector, developed with a focus on strategic presentation and user experience. The project delivers a modern interface with dynamic navigation and visual elements that reinforce credibility and clear communication. Using React, TypeScript, and SwiperJS, the application combines interactivity and performance, applying front-end development best practices to ensure efficiency, responsiveness, and visual consistency across different devices.

items.title: Meteora Store
items.description: A clothing and accessories e-commerce developed with a focus on usability, content organization, and browsing experience. The application features an intuitive interface with a responsive layout and features that facilitate product exploration. Built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and SwiperJS, the project prioritizes performance, clarity in information presentation, and a fluid experience, providing the user with an efficient and pleasant journey within the platform.

items.title: Calmaria SPA
items.description: Calmaria SPA is a web application developed to represent the digital presence of a wellness company, focusing on providing an accessible, pleasant, and intuitive user experience. The project features a modern and carefully structured interface, prioritizing visual clarity, fluid navigation, and digital inclusion. With a strong emphasis on accessibility and advanced CSS styling, the application follows front-end development best practices, ensuring compatibility, responsiveness, and usability across different devices and contexts. The result is a solution that consistently combines aesthetics, performance, and accessibility.
